abi_version=0.1.0
builtins_platform=NATIVE
compiler=skotch
compiler_version=0.8.3
depends=stdlib
native_targets=macos_arm64
unique_name=inputkt

                          }
                        },

                          3
                        ]
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              ],
              "terminator": {
                "ReturnValue": 4
              }
            }
          ],
          "return_ty": "Any"
        }
      ],
      "constructor": {
        "id": 0,
        "name": "<init>",
        "params": [
          0
        ],

            "Class": "InputKt$Lambda$4"
          }
        ],

                      },

                        0

              }

          }

      }
    }
  ],
